title: Profession Nuke
description: Allows modpackers to disable villager professions via config
body:
This mod allows the player to completely delete any unwanted village professions from the game via editing the config file. 

Config format goes as follows: (the default value is left blank)


```python
#To deactivate a villager profession, simply add the profession name to this list. If you wanted to remove librarians for example, simply add "librarian", to add multiple add a comma in between entries.
"Professions to be nuked" = ["librarian"]
```
